summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Remy subscription management features (Mi Suscripcion page). All 7 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed for both subscribed and non-subscribed users.
critical_code_review_comments: All subscription features working correctly including days_remaining calculation, auto_renewal flag, and plan_details
Manual subscription type correctly hides cancel button and shows 'Acceso otorgado por el administrador' notice
Mercado Pago is in PRODUCTION mode as noted in requirements
seed_data_creation: Restored test@example.com subscription to active state after cancel test modified it
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription management features complete. Mi Suscripcion page shows: plan name, price, days remaining, renewal date, subscription type, benefits, FAQ. Manual subscriptions hide cancel button and show admin-granted notice. Non-subscribed users see 'Sin Suscripción Activa' with CTA.

subscription_status_api.details: Returns days_remaining, auto_renewal (false for manual), subscription_type, plan_details

cancel_subscription_api.details: Requires auth (401 without), cancels subscription correctly

mi_suscripcion_subscribed_user.details: Shows: Plan Mensual, $9,990 CLP/mes, Activa badge, 30 días remaining, renewal date, Acceso Manual type, benefits (4 items), FAQ, purple 'Acceso otorgado por el administrador' notice, NO cancel button

mi_suscripcion_non_subscribed_user.details: Shows: Sin Suscripción Activa, Sin suscripción badge, Suscribirme ahora CTA, FAQ

user_menu_mi_suscripcion_option.details: 'Mi Suscripción' option present in user dropdown menu with CreditCard icon

biblioteca_subscribed_user.details: Shows: 'Suscripción activa - Acceso completo' green badge, Premium badge in sidebar, Comenzar button, NO subscription banner, NO lock icons

biblioteca_non_subscribed_user.details: Shows: 'Desbloquea todo el contenido' banner, 'Suscribirse para acceder' button, lock icons, Free badge in sidebar

premium_badge_subscribed_user.details: Green 'Premium' badge with Crown icon visible in sidebar for subscribed users
